name: Monster Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt butter.
2. Shape dough into a disc.
3. Cut horizontally almost all the way through, leaving about 1/4 inch uncut along one side.
4. Open the dough and brush with half of the melted butter. Sprinkle with sugar and cinnamon.
5. Close the edges together.
6. Roll into a 10-inch circle.
7. Place on a baking sheet and cover. Let rise for about 30 minutes.
8. Use scissors to cut holes for the mouth and eyes.
9. Push foil into the holes to keep them open.
10. Cut deep gashes into the top of the head for spiky hair.
11. Brush with remaining melted butter.
12. Bake until the bread sounds hollow when tapped, about 40 minutes.
13. Remove the foil and continue baking until lightly browned, about 5 minutes.
14. Decorate with candy while the bread is still warm.
Time: 30 minutes
Total time: 1 hour and 45 minutes
